reviews.review_description: The game is fun. The graphics are okay and hand tracking is also okay. The game is scary at times.  Warning: the game was almost impossible for me to play. The game requires a scan of your room and it would not work. It was really frustrating to get it to finally scan my room. I had to watch a youtube video of someone showing how to get the game to scan my room and work. I shouldn't have to do that!  There's only 7 missions. They should add more missions. If you can get it to play it is enjoyable.

reviews.review_title: Love this game and it does work !
reviews.review_description:
At first the game would crash each time I tried to play..

I seen were it said “ make sure u turn on experimental and clear out the stored boundary  “ or whatever it said .
I did that . Turned everything on in the experimental settings. Went back into loading the game up . Once the desk popped up I went too the camera ( capture app ) scanned my placed then BOOM it worked .. spent hours playing this 

I hope this game blows up lol

I love the fact that u get to have a shot out with the guy that sells u the guns 😂😂😂
I played months ago and today I went back to it and it doesn't work. I wonder if we can get reimbursed for apps that stopped working. I played less than 2 hours.

If I could write a zero-star review, I absolutely would 
 for one sole reason. YOU CAN'T PLAY THE ACTUAL GAME. Unless you're Rockefeller living in a mansion with unfathomable amounts of space, the game will tell you that your boundary is too small. Highly infuriating. Waste of money.
It doesn't matter what size room you're in, you can't get beyond room setup. I tried 3 different rooms in my house. I have no clue how to get around this. Can someone in the support team please help.
I put it as 5 star for people to see but you can't set up the door or spawn shop so don't buy it

Start with the positives, fun game, decent graphics and mixed reality, with a great promise of the game progressing into something amazing, also the physics of shooting and reloading are good.

But.........
They haven't used the roomscale as well as other apps have and you still have to give yourself a boundary.

Nothing is remembered, you have to set up the doors, table and shop every single time. 

The shooting doesn't register all the time and you can waste up to half a clip not registering. 

When they sort these issues it will be a top game

I played for a week then after a while it just stop working I couldn't play it I tried rescaning my boundarie I restarting my head set I even uninstall and reinstalled it but nothing worked 1 year later I tried again and again I used qwest 2 and 3 none worked wasted of money
Doesn’t Work

-Game purchased
-Game installed
-Desk to start game spawns outside of stationary boundary (after my first launch, it stopped reading that this was a MR app… therefore my boundary still exists after launching the app, and I cannot access the starting table to play AT ALL.)
-restart
-launch again
-desk spawns outside of my wall….
-reset guardian
-desk is approachable now
-start game
-attempts to build shop, can only build doors that don’t let me place them
-FORCE QUIT, UNINSTALL, GETTING A REFUND.

NOTE FOR DEVELOPERS
This game has been out a while now so I figured I’d buy it and see how it is in its current stage. Judging by the reviews, the devs haven’t even TRIED to correct these issues. Potentially abandoned? I have to say, the trailer on the store is good enough to lure you into the scam that is: ZOMBIES NOIR!

Another one said that this game would be good except when I got it it kind of sucked and like someone else said you’re stuck in the menu which then you watch a video and it still makes no sense and also I barely have that much space and my VR still says that I am on a high-level which gets me really annoyed which means I cannot play that much games so I would give this game an F minus But if you wanna waste your money and just support this place which kind of sucks yeah just go for it and buy it but let me just tell you it sucks
It has a bureau. But you cant do anything. Allso the refund does not work.

Does not work ,says 
my ceiling to low
This is not good.

reviews.review_title: I got the game to work
reviews.review_description: I got the game to work. It was fun I shot zombies. It was hard.

reviews.review_title: Try it dont see the stars
reviews.review_description: As long as they update it this is really amazing game and really easy to start playing

reviews.review_title: The best game i love it.
reviews.review_description: So funny shoot and upgrade.

Pretty smooth gameplay and easy to get immersed in the world. It definitely needs a bigger size room and it can be very tricky to set up a room boundary that works with the doors and shop space. For the money it's hard to beat the value.

The game is absolut not playable. Stucked in the start menue. No clue what to do. Scanning the room for a MR experience, than after minutes able to start a game (maybe) but can not place any doors. So back to start. Keep your hands away from this one. Just steals your money. Wonder how such a bad game can be kept in the store.

I had a lot of fun playing the game! It's really neat seeing your real life space become a place where zombies come in. Weapons are pretty fun, especially the exploding "Royale with Brainz" cheeseburger. There's a lot of potential here, especially looking at the meta progression with the badges. Excited to see how it turns out after the full launch!

reviews.review_title: Can't set up the doors or anything
reviews.review_description:
Literally tried a billion times in a very spacious place to set the doors, but it's always (in red), and when i get lucky to set 1 or 2 i get stuck to add anything else.

So annoying the way they are trying so hard to make it that specific and accurate...i mean if for whatever reason i couldn't place a door just give me the option to set them anywhere and let me freaking play!!!

Spent so much time and wasted money and couldn't play a single minute!!!!
